post.headline: Export your records before a permanent change
post.subtext: Advanced settings let recipients download their Hush Line data, including encrypted PGP messages, before deleting an account.
post.image_alt_text: Dark desktop social image showing the Hush Line Advanced settings page, with controls to download a data export, encrypt the export with a PGP key, and delete the account.

social.bluesky:
A tip line can hold records that matter to a newsroom, law office, school, nonprofit, or security team.

Hush Line lets recipients export their data, including encrypted PGP messages, before a permanent account change.

Learn more at https://hushline.app.
social.linkedin:
A tip line can hold records that matter to a newsroom, law office, school, nonprofit, or security team.

Hush Line's Advanced settings let recipients download their data, including encrypted PGP messages, before making a permanent account change. The export can be encrypted with the recipient's PGP key.

Learn more at https://hushline.app.
social.mastodon:
A tip line can hold records that matter to a newsroom, law office, school, nonprofit, or security team.

Hush Line's Advanced settings let recipients download their data, including encrypted PGP messages, before making a permanent account change.

Learn more at https://hushline.app.

post.rationale: Selected the Advanced settings screenshot because the other candidates repeat more recent notification or vision posts. This recipient-shared screen supports a practical workflow for journalists, lawyers, educators, nonprofits, and other trusted recipients who need control over their records before deleting or changing an account.
post.copy_brief: Write for recipients and staff using Hush Line day to day, not for platform admins.
post.title: Settings - Advanced (artvandelay)

summary: A daily recipient-facing post about using Advanced settings to export Hush Line records before making permanent account changes.
